description.unified: Heals 4 allies with lowest HP 10% of Max HP, and heals extra ??? HP over [10sec->8 sec]. This effect cannot be dispelled.
Dispels all negative effects. M.DEF is increased by ??? for [15sec->20 sec].
Deals a total of ??? M.DMG over 10 attacks to enemies within range. Hit enemies' ATK Spd is reduced by [10%->25%].
Every [8sec->7 sec], an ally with the lowest Hp recovers [1000 Mana->1 orb of mana] and ??? HP.

IV.unified: Mana Recovery per sec of the target is increased by [15%->50%].
CC Resist is increased by [120->250] for [15 sec->20 sec].
All DMG the target takes is increased by 25%.

light.unified: Mana Cost is increased by 1 and skill effect range changes to all allies.
Each hit removes 250 mana from the target.

dark.unified: In exchange for 1 additional Mana Cost, Silence enemies in range for 1 sec.
Also supplies 1 orb of mana to the [2 allies->ally] with the highest ATK.

description.unified: [Soulrush] Mana cost is reduced by 1 and heals all allies' HP by {0}% of DMG.

dark.unified: Upon attacking, there is a 10% chance to reduce all DEF of the target by 20% and reduce all the hero's cooldowns by 5%.

description.unified: Every 20 sec, an ally with the lowest HP turns invisible for {0} sec. An invisible ally becomes immune to P.DMG, and HP will not drop below 1%. MP Recovery per sec is increased to [35%->{1}%].
